underlying_goal: Compare an open-source code-review skill with their own code-reviewer configuration, then absorb the best parts into their own setup
friction_detail: Claude initially tried to create reference files under the agent directory, but user caught that references/ is a skill-only feature, requiring a pivot to a skill-based architecture.
brief_summary: User wanted to compare and merge advantages from an open-source code-review skill into their own setup; after an architecture correction, all files were created and pushed successfully.
